topic: Line 3 REWIND ERROR on backing takeup

messages.text: REWIND ERROR on line 3, backing paper piling up at the takeup
the rewind/takeup motor isn't keeping tension on the spent backing. could be a slipping rewind clutch or the backing came off the takeup mandrel
backing slipped off the rewind core
lock out, re-wrap the backing onto the rewind mandrel a couple turns, make sure the dancer/tension arm moves freely, then restore and test
re-wrapped, tension arm is moving, REWIND ERROR cleared
